ksa_text: Skill in designing and running data stewardship programs, including steward selection, training, responsibility definition, ownership and accountability assignment, service level agreements, and performance measurement.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-S-003 (DG, Skill) maps to Performance Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4327 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.433, eu_ai_act=0.422, nist_ai_rmf=0.417. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within performance metrics, KPI analysis, and operational reporting.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4327 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DG-S-003 (DG, composite 0.4327) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets does not surface this DG-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4327 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DG domain content at composite 0.4327 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4327, domain DG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
